THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT EDIA, SAMUEL I. TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MURPHY, BRUCE A. CORNELISON V. KORNBLUTH (1975) 15 CAL. 3D 590, 606-607. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT/APPELLANT AGAINST PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT IN THE AMOUNT ZERO. TOTAL JUDGMENT IS ZERO. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT IN THE AMOUNT OF ZERO. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:08AM
Judge Pro Tem David May, Clerk-P. Natt, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Samuel I. Edia appeared in Pro Per. Respondent Bruce A. Murphy appeared in Pro Per. Michelle Santiago was witness for Respondent. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge May.
10:42AM
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
